display_text: Templar Assassin Aghanim's Scepter: Psionic Projection — Provides global mobility and burst damage potential, countering split-push strategies and enabling surprise initiations. The channeled teleport to traps allows TA to bypass vision control and instantly detonate traps for 400 bonus damage, creating sudden pickoff opportunities.
search_text: Templar Assassin Aghanim Scepter global mobility split-push counter vision bypass burst damage

display_text: Templar Assassin Aghanim's Shard: Psionic Trap Upgrade — Enhances area denial and vision control while adding a silence effect to trap detonations. This counters channeled abilities and escape mechanisms, forcing enemies to reposition or lose access to crucial spells during engagements.
search_text: Templar Assassin Aghanim Shard silence anti-channel vision control area denial
